item.title: The boring way to become a billionaire ...in 77 years
item.author: THE SUNDAY TIMES
item.description: THE HOLDINGS OF TIM TAUBMAN'S CRAZY FUND Impax Environmental Markets Plc 10.9% Polar Capital Technology Trust Plc 10.8% Scottish Mortgage Investment Trust Plc 10.4% iShares Core S&P 500 10% JP Morgan American Investment Trust Plc 10% Xtrackers MSCI World Momentum Factor 9.7% Xtrackers MSCI World Information Technology 9.6% Invesco Nasdaq 100 9.6% Allianz Technology Trust Plc 9.5% iShares S&P 500 Information Technology 9.4%
